title: Chapter 149
content:
Chapter 148

I was summoned by the lady of this castle to her private temporary chambers for what I presumed was “a necessary discussion regarding the new arrangement at the castle.”

As we entered the room, I finally realized that we were in a luxurious castle and a powerful family. The simple look of Zara’s room was what I took to define the usual look of this castle. I was wrong.

Heavy velvety drapes in deep crimson framed tall windows that overlooked the manicured gardens. Ornate gilded furniture, plush carpets woven with intricate patterns, and a large marble fireplace provided both comfort and status.

A crystal chandelier hung from the ceiling, casting a warm, golden light over the entire room.

This room was befitting the highest-ranking noble of this era.

On a high-backed velvet armchair near the fireplace sat a woman who took my breath away, although not as much as the GILF who was making her way to the woman and stood by her.

I could only presume that woman to be Carlson’s wife and Zara’s mother. An older, more mature version of Zara. She seemed to be in her late forties, but looks could be deceiving in this world, as I may have explained many times before.

The strong resemblance to her daughter was further enhanced by the refined elegance that came with her age and experience.

Her hair was mostly black with elegant silver streaks running through it, giving her a distinguished, sophisticated look rather than fully silver. She kept her hair long and styled in noble fashion, pinned with fine jewels.

Her skin was a little on the darker side than her daughter's, but still within the category of creamy white. Remarkably well-preserved, I must say, no blemish in sight.

Her figure was very similar to Zara's, though softer and more mature.

J-cup breasts, full and heavy like her daughter, with a natural, gentle sag only to enhance their voluptuous appeal.

Her waist was relatively slim, ending at the wide, fertile hips that resembled her daughter, or even more than her.

Alas, since she was sitting, I couldn’t say anything about her ass or the rest of her body, but I hoped I would soon get the chance to.

Her face was strikingly beautiful, refined, and mature. The same kind of cheekbones and full lips as Zara, but I didn’t know why; she had this commanding expression and wise, dark eyes that could shift from elegant poise to a sharp look in an instant.

The way she sat alone described the undeniable authority of a high noble lady who ran a powerful household for decades.

Looking at her now, I could tell why I felt that crushing pressure at the door. It wasn’t the pressure of an overpowered lady. It was the pressure of a cunning and calculating woman.

If my analysis was correct, then she was even more dangerous than Carlson.

“You must be Jack.” She said in a soft tone, but it felt heavy again as it did at the door.

“Yes, my lady.” I immediately kneeled in her presence because this was one person in front of whom I could make no mistakes. I knew almost nothing about her, and compared to Carlson, she was even more of a threat, so it was better to tread lightly.

“I have heard of you from my husband.” She didn’t comment on my reaction and continued, “I was told you possess a special ability.”

“Y-yes, my lady,” I replied, keeping the act going of a nervous commoner whose environment had changed drastically from a small town to a giant castle.

“While I have heard of it, I have yet to believe such an ability can exist. If you do not mind, I would like to observe it with my own eyes.” She said gently, but her voice didn’t carry a request.

It was a command.

“Of course, my lady. However you need.” I immediately replied.

“Good, you may begin by showing me your penis, as I understand your power comes from there.” She commanded next.

“Understood, my lady. May I please stand up?” I asked.

“I never asked you to kneel.” She replied with a smile.

“Yes, my lady.” I stood up, and taking a deep breath to hide my nervousness, I unbuckled and lowered my pants, revealing the depressing stub every man in this world had.

“I do not see anything different from normal. Explain this to me.” The lady of this castle asked.

“Just a second, my lady. Forgive me as I am a little nervous.” I bowed and immediately explained.

She didn’t say anything in return and just waited for me to make my next move.

I once again took a deep breath to show my nervousness and activated the state of completion, which I could have done so from the beginning, but I wanted to make sure she saw everything from start to end.

This woman, again I say, was very dangerous.

As my dick began to enlarge, I noticed the expressions on the woman before me. While Valeria had a slight change in expression from her usual stoic, trained expression, not even a flicker crossed the noble lady’s eyes, let alone a twitch of amazement or anything.

“That is something. I did not know a penis could enlarge like that.” The lady spoke.

“I-it is an ability that awakened on the day of my awakening, my lady. Forgive me, but I do not know the reason behind it.” I replied in a nervous tone as if I was afraid of offending her with my answer.

“It is alright. How would you know something that has never been seen before?” The lady spoke as if it were obvious, before silence stretched again.

“Come closer.” She commanded after some time.

I didn’t reply and began to walk closer to her, my pants still around my knees to display that I forgot to take them off in my nervousness. Every act was important. A small slip-up, and her keen eyes would get everything.

I couldn’t allow that under any circumstances.

Once I was close enough to her that I was within an arm’s reach, I stopped on my own before anyone could stop me.

She extended her hand and grabbed my dick softly, making it twitch slightly.

“Hmm… Why did it react to my touch just now?” She asked.

“I do not know, my lady. But I feel pleasure whenever my penis is stimulated by touch or something else.” I replied.

“Stimulated?” She asked before she asked again, “Show me what to do.”

“Certainly, my lady.” I was about to go on before she let go of it, leaving me confused.

Seeing the genuine confusion on my face, she chuckled and said, “I do not intend to observe it on my own. You shall ask Valeria to do what you need, and I will only observe.”

“…”

Thank you, god.

My faith in God that day became stronger than at any other time.

“Th-then, may I ask Lady Valeria to follow me to a distance so my lady can observe more clearly?” I requested, and my request was immediately accepted.

“Alright. Follow his directives, Valeria.” The lady simply said and leaned back in her luxurious chair.

Could there ever be a bigger reward than this? A sexy, bombastic GILF at my disposal who would do anything I would ask of her.

“Where shall I go?”

Ahh~

Music to my ears.

While Valeria’s voice was stoic, it was gentle and soothing. No matter how she was trained, she couldn’t let go of her inherent qualities.

“Please, my lady, over here.” I guided her a little distance away towards a couch. Once I had told her where to go, I got behind her so I could watch her walk, even though that was exactly what I had done when we were coming here.

“Now?” She asked, turning only her head to me.

“Please bend over, with your arms on the couch arm.” I guided her again, and she followed my instructions flawlessly.

The sheer size of her ass, the huge, pillowy cheeks kept pressing against her uniform, making it difficult for her to bend over. That was how big it was.

“It seems you are having difficulty, my lady. Allow me to…” I stepped forward and lifted the skirt of her maid uniform over her hips to reveal her massive, soft ass in full. It was thick, juicy, and incredibly plush. Easily the biggest I had ever seen.

The cheeks of her ass were so large and heavy that they jiggled even with the slightest of movements.

Gulp…

I gulped and kneeled behind her, putting my hands on her enormous cheeks to spread them apart, sinking my fingers into her yielding, soft flesh.

My hands practically sank into her flesh, with how soft it was. I was already having difficulty even trying to grab her ass.

And it was only the beginning.

Gulp.
